calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Transfer Of Trusts And Modifying Trusts
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Victoria Kaempf for Richard Kimball.

The Court stated that it was appropriate for the Trust to be administered here and expressed concern about the requested modifications of the Trust. Ms. Kaempf presented oral argument to support her position, spoke of Richard's (Son) financial status, stated that he supports his Sisters with gifts and that the Mother wanted to exercise her authority to exclude him. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Order Accepting Transfer Of Trusts And Modifying Trusts
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Continued To Jun-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
